positive: A stylized, intricate celestial map depicting a whimsical jungle and starry night sky merging into one cohesive design. The main subject features stylized geometric representations of crescent moons, scattered constellations forming animal silhouettes (like deer and winged lions), and bioluminescent exotic flora. Use a strong, contrasting color palette of deep midnight blues, vibrant teal, glowing emerald greens, and shimmering gold foil accents. The composition must be centralized, highly detailed, and designed as a repeating, seamless tile pattern suitable for fabric printing. The overall mood is magical and mysterious, with clean, bold lines and strong silhouette elements. Vector illustration style, highly ornamental, perfect symmetry, print-ready.
negative: lowres, blurry, artifacts, text, signature, watermark, logo, copyright, amateur, bad anatomy, extra limbs, noise, messy, jpeg artifacts
